top_signals.title: US Regulators Poised to Reshape Secret Ratings Process for Banks
top_signals.summary: US regulators are poised to unveil as soon as this week a plan that would overhaul how examiners secretly rate banks, according to people familiar with the matter, a move likely to be cheered by lenders.
